senses.gloss: to cause, to effect, to trigger, to generate

examples.text: وَكَانَ سَبَبُ قَتْلِهِ أَنَّ أَبَاهُ اسْتَعْمَلَهُ عَلَى الْأَنْدَلُسِ، كَمَا ذَكَرْنَا، عِنْدَ عَوْدِهِ إِلَى الشَّامِ، فَضَبَطَهَا وَسَدَّدَ أُمُورَهَا، وَحَمَى ثُغُورَهَا، وَافْتَتَحَ فِي إِمَارَتِهِ مَدَائِنَ بَقِيَتْ بَعْدَ أَبِيهِ،
examples.english: "And the reason for his killing was that his father had appointed him over Al-Andalus, as we have mentioned, upon his return to Ash-Sham, so he brought it under control and set its affairs in order, and protected its frontiers, and opened during his emirate cities that remained after his father,"
